motions.title: City Council Delays Vote on Taxi & Ride-Share Rules, Asks for New Options
motions.summary: City Council decided to push back a vote on new rules for taxis, limousines, and ride-sharing companies like Uber or Lyft. They asked city staff to come up with new proposals that specifically do not include changes for ride-sharing companies, meaning their regulations will stay the same for now while other vehicle-for-hire rules are considered.
motions.full_text: MOVED by Mayor Fillmore, seconded by Councillor Steele That the matter be deferred to the next meeting of Regional Council and that staff return with amendments to By-law T-1000, T-1008, and Administrative Order 39 that exclude Transportation Network Companies (TNCs) as alternative amendments.
